Title: Promote candidate to employee

As a HR operator
I want to convert a hired candidate into an employee
So that hiring handoff creates the employee directory record

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] PromoteEmployeeModal captures start date and employee details.
- [ ] Confirm creates or updates the employee-side record as implemented.
- [ ] Candidate/hiring state refreshes after promotion.
- [ ] Cancel leaves the candidate unchanged.

Notes: Promotion behavior should be browser-verified end to end.
